Case III. Male born on 15-3-1953 died in Sept. the same
year, lived for about six months. Birth was on Amavasya
though at the time of birth it was just over. Balance of Sani
Dasa was 17 vrs. 4 m. 13 d.

72 FUNDAMENTALS OF ASTROLOGY
Explanation :—Tula Lagua with Saturn in it (though retro-
grade) is supposed to give Rajayoga. Two benefics are aspect-
ing the Lagua. With all these the God of death would not spare
the child. Why ? The Lagna-lord has gone to the Maraka
